title: Wandering Trader Trim Templates
description: Make the Wandering Traders have all Trim Templates and Netherite Upgrades!
body:
### Here's the Wandering Trader Trim Templates Datapack !
*Includes 2 new trims!*

You can use it in 1.21 or newer versions, including 1.21.3! *Do not use with other wandering trader data-packs.*
This is only an example of what I would like wandering traders to work like. 

It adds 1/5 chance for:
- Wandering Traders to have a Trim Template trade, for 9 diamonds
- or Netherite Upgrade for 1 Netherite Ingot.

##### All templates have the same chance of appearing in the same slot, none have preference.
###### This is an unofficial modification of VanillaTweaks.
